title: Peak
description: Use AI to inspire your next build!
body:
IMPORTANT

REQUIRES AN OPENAI ACCOUNT! Go to OpenAI to get an API key. ![LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/0hVc9XV.jpg) [![homepage][1]][2] [![homepage][5]][6] # Summit: Minecraft At Its Peak **Peak** is a Minecraft mod that provides creative building inspiration and ideas to enhance your gameplay experience. It offers a unique feature that generates building ideas based on different themes, allowing you to embark on exciting building projects in your Minecraft world. With Peak, you can use the "/peak" command to trigger the generation of a building idea. Simply specify a theme such as "Medieval", "Modern", "Fantasy", "Industrial", or you can even write your own. The mod will then generate a descriptive suggestion for a building project within that theme. ## Features: - **Varied Themes:** Choose from the four starter themes or create your own to match your desires. - **Balanced Responses:** No concepts that wouldn't work in Minecraft. - **Optimized Performance:** Smooth and efficient gameplay experience. ## Steps: ![Screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/6c90WbE.jpg) ## The Log: ![Screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/H9hSIJg.jpg) [Patron]: https://patreon.com/Summitmc?utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=creatorshare_fan&utm_content=join_link [1]: https://i.imgur.com/91vhl0Y.png [2]: https://openai.com/ "Redirect to OpenAI" [3]: [4]: https://replicate.com/cjwbw/point-e "Redirect to Replicate" [5]: https://i.imgur.com/XCZiKxy.png [6]: https://patreon.com/Summitmc?utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=creatorshare_fan&utm_content=join_link "Redirect to Patreon"
